title: neotinea
intro: Neotinea is a genus of orchids, commonly known as wintergreen orchids, found in Europe and Asia, characterized by their unique, greenish-yellow flowers. The roots of the Neotinea plant are rich in tannins and saponins, which provide medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Neotinea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Neotinea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
